items.title: This Warren Buffett Favorite Was 1 of the Top 5 Buys of the Year. Here's How It Could Make You a Millionaire.
items.author: Adria Cimino
items.description: The article discusses the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY), a favorite investment of Warren Buffett and retail investors, and how it could potentially make an investor a millionaire through regular, long-term investment.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust as a favorite investment of Warren Buffett and retail investors, and explains how it could potentially make an investor a millionaire through regular, long-term investment in the fund.
